task: Find the next available dates for Alley Creek Camp.
graderReasoning: The agent searched Recreation.gov for Alley Creek Camp, opened the correct campground page (https://www.recreation.gov/camping/campgrounds/232512), and verified availability on both the visible campsite calendar and the Recreation.gov availability API for campground 232512. Evidence shows multiple sites marked available starting Wednesday, May 13, 2026, and the API summary reports counts by date (e.g. 2026-05-13: 56, 2026-05-14: 54, etc.). The user asked to find the next available dates, and the agent provided the earliest available dates with counts. Minor ambiguity about timezone/same-day booking does not negate that the correct next available dates were found.
final_result_response:
I found Alley Creek Camp on Recreation.gov: https://www.recreation.gov/camping/campgrounds/232512

Next available dates shown, with available-site counts:

- May 13, 2026: 56 sites
- May 14, 2026: 54 sites
- May 15, 2026: 51 sites
- May 16, 2026: 55 sites
- May 17, 2026: 60 sites
- May 18-19, 2026: 64 sites each day
- May 20, 2026: 62 sites

So the next available date is today, May 13, 2026, with many campsites open.
action_history: Opening Recreation.gov: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.recreation.gov/');
Searching for Alley Creek Camp: await page.locator('e20').fill('Alley Creek Camp');
Searching for Alley Creek Camp: await page.locator('e21').click();
Opening Alley Creek Camp result: await page.locator('e25').click();
